nameMeanings.name: Byrt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): nickname for a man with aremarkable beard, from Yiddish bord combined with GermanBart, both meaning ‘beard’.
Polish: from borta ‘braid, galloon’, a loanword from German (Borte).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John Byrt was born as the son of William Byrt and Jane Handscombe. He had at least 1 daughter with Byrt.
